activities_projects.title: Community Diversity Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand ethnic diversity in different countries
steps: List the ethnic communities of Belgium
List the ethnic communities of Sri Lanka
Create a comparison chart showing language and population percentage
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of information and neat presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Map Identification Activity
steps: Locate Belgium and Sri Lanka on a world map
Mark regions where major communities live
Label the communities using different colours
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops map reading and interpretation skills

activities_projects.title: Majoritarianism Discussion
steps: Write the meaning of majoritarianism
List policies adopted in Sri Lanka favouring Sinhala speakers
Discuss its impact on Tamil communities

activities_projects.title: Belgium Model Study
activities_projects.objective: Learn how Belgium resolved community conflict
steps: Write key features of the Belgian power-sharing model
Identify roles of central, state, and community governments
Explain how these arrangements reduced conflict
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands practical solutions to social conflicts

activities_projects.title: Civil War Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the causes of civil war in Sri Lanka
steps: Write causes of the Sri Lankan civil war
Describe demands of Tamil groups
Summarise its social and economic impact

activities_projects.title: Reasons for Power Sharing Poster
activities_projects.objective: Understand prudential and moral reasons for power sharing
steps: Write prudential reasons for power sharing
Write moral reasons for power sharing
Illustrate each reason with an example

activities_projects.title: Forms of Power Sharing Table
activities_projects.objective: Identify different forms of power sharing
steps: List the four forms of power sharing
Give examples of each form
Present them in a table format

activities_projects.title: Role Play on Coalition Government
activities_projects.objective: Understand how political parties share power
steps: Assign students different political parties
Simulate an election result without clear majority
Form a coalition government through discussion

activities_projects.title: Local Governance Survey
activities_projects.objective: Observe power sharing at local level
steps: Visit or research about a local panchayat or municipality
Identify roles of elected members
Write a short report on how decisions are shared
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects textbook concepts with real-life governance

activities_projects.title: News Analysis on Power Sharing
activities_projects.objective: Understand contemporary examples of power sharing
steps: Collect one news article related to government power sharing
Identify the groups involved
Explain how power is being shared or disputed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves critical thinking about current affairs
